__inputs.name: DS_PROMETHEUS
__inputs.label: Prometheus
__inputs.description: Prometheus data source for SSH stats metrics

__inputs.name: DS_INFINITY
__inputs.label: Infinity (SSH Stats API)
__inputs.description: Infinity data source pointing at an exporter-reachable ssh_stats HTTP server URL (for example http://127.0.0.1:9122 on the same host)

title: SSH Activity Monitor
description: Real-time SSH login monitoring: sessions, users, failed attempts, and security events

panels.title: Active Sessions
panels.description: Currently active SSH sessions

panels.title: Unique Users
panels.description: Distinct SSH users observed

panels.title: Logins (Range)
panels.description: Successful SSH logins in the selected time range

panels.title: Failed Attempts
panels.description: Failed SSH login attempts (wrong password, invalid user)

panels.title: Avg Session Duration
panels.description: Average SSH session duration over the selected time range

panels.title: Errors
panels.description: Port forwarding failures and authentication errors

panels.title: Approximate User Session Timeline
panels.description: Current/recent sessions by user only (not full history). Blocks from active-session gauges with 2m lookback.

panels.title: Approximate Source Session Timeline
panels.description: Current/recent sessions by source only (not full history). Each row is a source; blocks from active-session gauges with 2m lookback.

panels.title: Login Rate
panels.description: Successful SSH logins per 5-minute window, broken down by user

panels.title: Active Sessions Over Time
panels.description: Number of active SSH sessions over time (current/recent only; for historical logins use “Logins per user over time” or “Logins in selected range”)

panels.title: Logins by User
panels.description: Distribution of SSH logins across users

panels.title: Top Sources
panels.description: Most active SSH source hostnames or IP addresses

panels.title: Logins by Auth Method
panels.description: SSH authentication method breakdown

panels.title: Failed Logins by Source
panels.description: Failed SSH login attempts grouped by source hostname or IP

panels.title: Failed Login Attempts Over Time
panels.description: Rate of failed SSH authentications

panels.title: SSH Errors Over Time
panels.description: Port forwarding failures, pre-auth disconnects, and other errors

panels.title: Session Duration Distribution
panels.description: Histogram of SSH session durations

panels.title: Avg Session Duration by User
panels.description: Rolling 1-hour average session duration over time, per user

panels.title: Logins by Day & Hour
panels.description: When do SSH logins happen? Rows = days, columns = hours (00-23). Brighter = more logins.

panels.title: Currently Active Sessions
panels.description: Live view of users currently logged in right now (not historical logins; use “Logins in selected range” or “Logins per user over time” for past activity)

panels.title: Recent Session History
panels.description: Completed SSH sessions with login/logout times and duration

panels.title: Known User Status
panels.description: Users observed in SSH logs with live online/offline state and current remote session counts

panels.title: Logins in Selected Range (by User)
panels.description: Successful SSH login count per user for the dashboard time range. Use the time picker to include older logins.

panels.title: Recent Failed Login Attempts
panels.description: Failed SSH authentication attempts with hostname-aware source labels and raw IPs

panels.title: Logins per User Over Time
panels.description: Successful logins per user in rolling 1-hour windows
